canonical_question: How do you integrate ERP with supplier portals like Ariba, Coupa, or Jaggaer for SRM?
aliases: ERP to supplier portal integration using cXML and OCI punch-out
How to connect SAP Ariba, Coupa, or Jaggaer with your ERP for procurement
Supplier relationship management platform integration playbook for ERP systems
End-to-end SRM integration — supplier onboarding through invoice flip

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: SAP Ariba CIG renamed to SAP Integration Suite, managed gateway (2025); Coupa token-based supplier portal access (Jan 2026)

constraints: Punch-out catalogs require HTTPS — HTTP endpoints are rejected by all major SRM platforms
cXML SharedSecret credentials must be exchanged out-of-band — no automated provisioning API exists on Ariba Network
Supplier master sync must complete before transactional docs flow — orphan POs cause cascading failures in 3-way match
OCI protocol (SAP) is limited to cart transfer only — no order confirmation, ASN, or invoice support via OCI
Coupa API rate limits: 50 requests/minute for non-integration users, custom limits for certified integrations
Ariba Network supplier enablement requires separate registration per buyer — no global supplier ID portability
cXML invoice flip (PO-flip) requires exact line-item match — partial invoicing needs manual cXML OrderReference construction

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User needs only internal procurement approval workflow without external supplier portal
User needs only AP invoice automation without supplier portal
User needs iPaaS platform comparison for general ERP integration

depends_on.label: Master Data Management for ERP — vendor master sync patterns

related_to.label: Procure-to-Pay Integration — full P2P flow including matching and payment
Invoice-to-Pay AP Automation — downstream invoice processing

solves.label: Order-to-Cash — supplier-side view of the same transaction

alternative_to.label: SAP IDoc/EDI — traditional EDI-based procurement without SRM portal

often_confused_with.label: Procure-to-Pay — covers internal requisition-to-payment; this card covers the external supplier portal layer

inputs_needed.question: Which SRM / procurement platform are you integrating with?
What procurement processes need integration?
options: Full P2P (punch-out + PO + ASN + invoice + payment)

inputs_needed.question: Which ERP system is on the other side?
What integration method do you prefer?
